ValueSet: ValueSet – FR ValueSet Codes vaccins CIS (BDPM)

Official URL: https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/ValueSet/fr-vs-vaccine-code-cis Version: 0.1.0-snapshot
Draft as of 2026-06-18 Computable Name: FRValueSetVaccineCodeCISDocument

Codes issus de la Base de Données Publique des Médicaments (BDPM) pour identifier les vaccins par leur code CIS.

References

  • Immunization - FR Immunization Document
  • ImmunizationRecommendation - FR Immunization Recommendation Document

Logical Definition (CLD)

  • Include all codes defined in https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/terminologie-bdpm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)

 

Expansion

Expansion from smt.esante.gouv.fr based on codesystem Base de données publique du médicament version 2026-06-01

This value set has 41,218 codes in it. In order to keep the publication size manageable, only a selection (1,000 codes) of the whole set of codes is shown.
